case_title: KELLOG, KINDRA vs. HUETT, SCOTT et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELLOG, KINDRA AS TO DEFENDANT HUETT, SCOTT DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-16-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-18-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-27-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-16-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUN-16-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUL-18-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-18-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUL-18-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-17-1994 CONTINUED FROM JUL-18-1994 TO AUG-17-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-17-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-17-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TOTAL AMOUNT OF SANCTIONS $150.00 TO BE PAID ON/OR BEFORE 9/15/94, AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-15-1994 CONTINUED FROM AUG-17-1994 TO SEP-15-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
